headline: Ex-Couple's 'Custody' Of Their Spotify Playlist Has Become More Contentious Than Their Divorce
summary: The playlist is titled 'our songs :(' and both are trying to remove 'Uptown Funk.'
fullBody: Emma and Jake MusicWar are fighting for custody of their shared Spotify playlist. 'I made it,' Emma claims. 'I named it,' Jake counters. The playlist currently has 47 songs. Both have been adding and removing 'Uptown Funk' passive-aggressively. The mediator has suggested they 'split the playlist.' Emma gets the sad songs. Jake gets the angry ones. 'Uptown Funk' remains in limbo.
